name: Interactive Cat Toy, Interactive Cat Toy Ball Automatic Funny Cat Ball Toy Batteries Operated Electric Funny Cat Toy Ball for Indoor Cats

With centrifugal rolling device, it will automatically change direction when encountering obstacles, so don't worry about your toy stuck in the corner.4.
